case_title: FREEMAN, WILLIAM vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-21-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-01-1994

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 5/25/94. PLTF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL MAR-30-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-21-1994, CONTINUED TO MAY-25-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF TO NOTIFY DEFT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1994, DENIED DENIED W/O PREJ (CRC 367(C)

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-25-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
